markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To explore a potential content partnership and review a past engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Past Engagement Review:** A pilot partnership paused without a clear reason. Al will investigate with Vivek and Mitesh to ensure any new engagement avoids past issues.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [**Strategic Alignment:** The new strategy targets business buyers for three core solutions (Trusted Research Environment, Data Commercialization, Research Commons), shifting from a user-focused approach.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [**Viability Test:** The partnership's success hinges on two conditions: 1) a proven search opportunity for business-centric content, and 2) Manifold's ability to maintain a rapid review cadence (5 articles/week, 2-day turnaround).](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [**POC Role:** Mitesh is a candidate for the senior POC role, which requires translating business strategy and enforcing the review cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)

## Topics

### Context: Past Partnership & Current Need

  - [Al is planning Manifold's Q1 2026 strategy, including hiring fractional support.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [A past GrowthX pilot with Manifold was paused and never revisited.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
      - [**Connection:** Vivek introduced GrowthX via Mitesh (a Prophecy buyer).](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
      - [**POC:** Taylor Gleason (Manifold), who has since left.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** The pause was due to Taylor's maternity leave, not performance.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [**Action:** Al will contact Vivek and Mitesh to understand the pause and get Mitesh's feedback on GrowthX's work for Prophecy.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)

### Proposed Strategy: Buyer-Centric Content

  - [**Focus:** Target business buyers (C-level) over end-users (scientists).](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Buyers care about strategic integration and business outcomes, which is a better fit for SEO content than the highly technical topics that interest end-users.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [**Core Solutions:** Content will support three prioritized solutions:](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
      - [Trusted Research Environment](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
      - [Data Commercialization](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
      - [Research Commons](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [**Content Model:** Educational guides for business buyers, similar to Harvey's "How to integrate AI into your legal practice."](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)

### Viability Test: Search Opportunity & Review Cadence

  - [**GrowthX's Model:** A scalable SEO content engine (5 articles/week) for business-level topics, not deep scientific white papers.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Manifold's highly technical domain requires a collaborative review process to ensure accuracy and maintain scale.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [**Required Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Deliver 5 drafts by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
      - [**Manifold:** Approve by Wednesday/Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
      - [**Goal:** Publish all 5 articles by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [**Action:** Al will assess if Manifold's internal SMEs can commit to this rapid review cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)

### POC Role: Translating Strategy to Execution

  - [**Requirement:** A senior POC to translate business strategy into content direction and enforce the review cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [**Candidate:** Mitesh, who is already a strategic advisor to Manifold and has expressed interest in managing SEO/AEO.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Al:**](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
      - [Investigate the previous partnership's pause with Vivek and Mitesh.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
      - [Assess if Manifold's SMEs can commit to the 2-day review cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
      - [Send Al the previous engagement's calibration articles and kickoff recordings.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
      - [Have the GrowthX team analyze the search opportunity for Manifold's three core solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
      - [Follow up async in early January.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
      - [If both viability tests pass, schedule a tactical follow-up.](https://fathom.video/share/snaPc9jJ92Vw1kmEXbGJdugxaLwVeqZC?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
